title: AI GTA Loading Screen
description: Turns the photo into high-contrast GTA-style loading screen vector art.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a satirical open-world crime-game loading-screen illustration. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identities, key facial features, pose, camera angle, and outfit. Apply a high-contrast vector illustration style with clean bold black ink outlines, smooth color shading, and dynamic lighting. The background should feature a stylized warm sunset cityscape with palm tree silhouettes, without logos or game UI. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, photorealism, realistic textures, oil painting, pencil sketch, low contrast, bad anatomy, malformed hands, distorted faces, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. sunset city background, high contrast shadows...
